title: Fabulosa Multi Purpose Anti Bacterial Bathroom Cleaner Disinfectant Trigger Spray with Lasting Fragrance, 9 Pack, 500ml, Lime, Basil & Mandarin
features: Kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses: sanitise and prevent the spread of bacteria and viruses with Fabulosa cleaning products, while keeping your family and pets protected; Fabulosa is vegan friendly and never tested on animals
Cleans and shines: works as a sticky stuff remover from stubborn surfaces, leaving a lasting sparkle around your home
Streak-free: get that glistening smear-free finish every time with the easy to use Fabulosa Bathroom Spray, perfect results every time
Ready to use: Fabulosa spray bottle provides a convenient, hassle free quick cleaning solution with a simple turn nozzle and trigger for use for all around your bathroom

Long lasting freshness: an active air freshener that eliminates unpleasant odours and leaves behind a beautifully sophisticated-smelling fragrance, filling the air with a strong mysterious fruity scent
description: Product Description Keep stocked up on your cleaning supplies with Fabulosa Lime, Basil and Mandarin scented Bathroom Cleaner, a must have cleaning solution. This versatile product hygienically cleans hard surfaces and leaves behind a sparkly shiny surface. Perfect cleaner for all around the bathroom including; shower, bath tub and sinks. Leave behind that absolutely fabulous aroma as you sterilise your surroundings with Fabulosa’s signature Winter Angel scent, without harsh chemical smells. Directions: Turn Nozzle to the open position. To fully disinfect the area, spray on area to be cleaned. Leave for 5 minutes and then wipe clean with a dry or damp cloth. For heavily soiled surfaces, repeat application. Ensure to turn nozzle to off position when finished. Safety Information: Caution: Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wash thoroughly after handling. May cause skin irritation. IF ON SKIN: Wash off immediately with plenty of soap and warm water. Remove contaminated clothing. Seek medical attention is irritation or symptoms persist. May cause irritation to eyes. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for 15 minutes holding the eyelids open. Seek medical attention is irritation or symptoms persist. May cause irritation to mucous membranes. IF INGESTED: DO NOT INDUCE VOMITING. IF INHALED: Move exposed person to fresh air. Use only in well ventilated areas. KEEP LOCKED UP AND OUT OF THE REACH OF CHILDREN. Keep container tightly closed. Keep away from food, drink and animal feeding stuffs. Wear protective gloves/ clothing, face/ eye protection. Do not allow product to enter drains. Ingredients Contains less than 5% Non-Ionic Surfactants
